faq.subtitle: Knowledge Base
faq.title: Frequently Asked <gradient>Questions</gradient>
faq.description: Everything you need to know about working with Horizon Tech

scope.question: What's your scope of work?
scope.answer: We deliver end-to-end technology projects: custom enterprise software, AI/ML pipelines, cloud infrastructure, IoT systems, DevOps automation, and digital transformation consulting. Whether you need a full platform built from scratch or a targeted integration with your existing stack, we handle architecture, development, testing, and deployment.

stack.question: What's your core technology stack?
stack.answer: Our core stack centers on enterprise-grade platforms: Azure and AWS for cloud, .NET and Node.js for backend, React and Angular for frontend, Kubernetes and Docker for orchestration, and Terraform for infrastructure as code. We also work extensively with Python for AI/ML workloads, Power BI and Fabric for business intelligence, and PostgreSQL, SQL Server, and MongoDB for data.

enterprise.question: How do you handle enterprise projects?
enterprise.answer: Every engagement starts with a discovery phase to define scope, architecture, and milestones. You get a dedicated team with a technical lead, regular milestone reviews, and direct access to the engineers building your system. We follow agile sprints with stakeholder demos, maintain transparent project boards, and provide weekly progress reports.

support.question: What does post-launch support look like?
support.answer: We offer structured support tiers with defined SLAs, including 24/7 monitoring, incident response, performance optimization, and feature iteration. Our support agreements cover bug fixes, security patches, infrastructure scaling, and proactive health checks — tailored to your uptime and response-time requirements.

integration.question: Can you integrate with our existing infrastructure?
integration.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in legacy modernization, API-first integrations, and hybrid cloud migrations. Whether you need to connect to on-premise ERP systems, migrate from monoliths to microservices, or bridge legacy databases with modern frontends, we have the migration playbooks and integration experience to make it seamless.

industries.question: What industries have you worked in?
industries.answer: Our team has delivered projects across fintech, healthcare, logistics, e-commerce, energy, and government sectors. We understand industry-specific requirements like PCI-DSS for payments, HIPAA considerations for health data, GDPR compliance for EU markets, and real-time telemetry for industrial IoT.

engagement.question: What does the engagement process look like?
engagement.answer: It starts with a discovery call to understand your goals and technical landscape. From there, we deliver a scoping document with architecture recommendations, timeline, and investment breakdown. Once approved, we kick off with a dedicated team, onboard into your tools and workflows, and begin the first sprint within days.

faq.ctaDescription: Have a project in mind? Let's talk scope, timeline, and budget.
